overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey depicting exploration of the Temple of Apollo in ancient Korinth. The player character walks through massive stone colonnades, lush gardens with flowering trees, covered pergolas, and approaches a monumental statue of Apollo surrounded by worshippers, concluding with a panoramic view of the ancient city.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside the Temple of Apollo, surrounded by massive stone columns and paved stone floors. The camera moves forward through the colonnade, transitioning from the sheltered interior to the exterior garden area around 8 seconds.

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a wide open plaza adorned with crimson decorative banners strung between stone columns. The ancient city of Korinth is visible in the distance. The lighting shifts to warm golden hour sunlight as the player walks across the paved terrace.

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to a dirt trail winding through a lush garden with vibrant purple flowering trees and tall cypress. The stone pergola becomes visible ahead as the player approaches the covered walkway.

segments.scene_description: The player enters a long covered walkway supported by ornate stone columns with a wooden lattice roof overhead. The path is paved with patterned stone tiles. Light filters through the lattice as the player proceeds toward the bright exit where a large statue is visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial terrace with monumental Apollo statue and worshippers

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the pergola and ascends a grand stone staircase to a ceremonial terrace. A massive marble statue of Apollo dominates the space, surrounded by worshippers with raised arms. Olive trees and lit ceremonial braziers frame the scene.

segments.scene_description: The player moves around the base of the Apollo statue, observing the worshippers up close. The camera then pans to reveal a sweeping panoramic view of ancient Korinth with its terracotta rooftops and distant mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sheltered stone interior of a temple into a vibrant, sun-drenched garden landscape. It begins within the Temple of Apollo, gliding past massive stone columns and across paved floors before emerging from the colonnade into the open air. As the camera enters a wide plaza, the lighting shifts to a warm golden hour glow, illuminating crimson decorative banners and revealing the distant city of Korinth. The scene then shifts from the paved terrace onto a winding dirt trail, moving through a lush garden filled with tall cypress and vibrant purple flowering trees. This progression finally leads the camera toward a stone pergola that looms ahead as the covered walkway comes into view.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shaded intimacy of a temple walkway into a grand, open-air ceremonial plaza overlooking a sprawling city. It begins within a long covered pergola, where light filters through a wooden lattice roof onto patterned stone tiles as the camera proceeds toward a bright exit. As the player emerges from the shade, the scene opens up and ascends a grand stone staircase to a terrace dominated by a massive marble statue of Apollo, framed by olive trees and flickering ceremonial braziers. The camera then glides around the base of the monument and the surrounding worshippers before finally panning outward to reveal a sweeping panoramic view of ancient Korinth with its terracotta rooftops and distant mountains.
